sampleProducts.title: Indus River Stone Mortar (Kharal)
sampleProducts.description: This exquisite mortar, meticulously carved from genuine Indus River Stone Mortar, showcases a deep, lustrous black hue with subtle natural veining that adds to its unique character. Its smooth, polished surface and minimalist design make it a versatile piece. Each mortar is unique due to the natural variations in the Indus River Stone.

sampleProducts.title: Natural Stone Facing Slabs for Wall Cladding
sampleProducts.description: These are natural stone facing slabs, ideal for adding a rustic and elegant touch to both interior and exterior walls. Their natural rough-cut finish provides unique texture and character, perfect for feature walls, accent areas, or full facade cladding. Durable and weather-resistant, these slabs are suitable for various architectural and design projects.

sampleProducts.title: Teardrop Shaped Polished Stone
sampleProducts.description: A beautifully polished stone piece, shaped like a teardrop. This versatile natural stone can be used as a decorative accent, a component for a blank for engraving, or as a unique craft supply. Its smooth finish highlights the natural beauty of the stone.

sampleProducts.title: Handmade Beaded Gemstone Cluster Necklace
sampleProducts.description: This unique handmade necklace features clusters of natural stone beads in warm red and orange tones, meticulously arranged on a dark cord. The design creates a flowing, organic look, making it a striking statement piece perfect for adding a touch of natural elegance and bohemian flair to any outfit.
